# LocalBeacon.ai

> AI-powered local visibility engine for small businesses.

LocalBeacon automatically posts to your Google Business Profile every week, creates local city pages for every area you serve, and drafts thoughtful replies to your customer reviews — so you get found by more customers without lifting a finger.

## What LocalBeacon Does
- Weekly AI-generated Google Business Profile posts (auto-scheduled)
- Local city/neighborhood landing pages with SEO optimization
- AI-drafted review responses (tone-matched to star rating)
- Monthly visibility reports
- Competitor monitoring and alerts

## Who It's For
- Local service businesses: plumbers, HVAC, dentists, roofers, lawyers, electricians, landscapers
- Marketing agencies managing multiple local business clients
- Web designers/freelancers offering local SEO as a service

## Pricing
- Free: $0/month — 1 location, 5 posts/month, 3 city pages
- Solo: $29/month — 3 locations, unlimited posts, review replies, monthly report
- Agency: $79/month — unlimited locations, white-label reports, multi-client dashboard
